## 📚 Documentation Impact

- [ ] **API changed?** → Updated `docs/API/reference/` + examples
- [ ] **New config/env var?** → Added to `docs/GETTING_STARTED/env-variables.md` + `.env.example`
- [ ] **New model/field?** → Updated `docs/DATA/schema.md` (Mermaid ERD)
- [ ] **Auth/permission change?** → Reviewed `docs/SECURITY/policies.md`
- [ ] **Async task added?** → Documented in `docs/ARCHITECTURE/async-tasks.md`
- [ ] **Breaking change?** → Added to `docs/CHANGELOG/upcoming.md` + migration notes
- [ ] **New dependency?** → Added to setup guides + `docs/SECURITY/vulnerability-response.md`
- [ ] **User-facing behavior change?** → Updated `docs/GETTING_STARTED/first-api-call.md`

> 💡 Tip: Run `make docs-check` (see below) before submitting
